segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translation.text: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Why was their disguise too perfect?

translation.text: 他们的伪装为什么过于完美？

segments.text: An ancient bus stopped by a dry riverbed, and a party of famous actors and actresses got off.

translation.text: 一辆老式公共汽车停在干涸的河床旁，一群著名男女演员下了车。

segments.text: Dressed in dark glasses and old clothes, they had taken special precautions so that no one should recognize them.

translation.text: 他们戴着墨镜，穿着旧衣服，采取了特别的防范措施，以免被人认出。

segments.text: But as they soon discovered, disguises can sometimes be too perfect.

translation.text: 不过，他们很快就发现，伪装有时也会过于完美。

segments.text: This is a wonderful place for a picnic, said Gloria Gleam.

translation.text: “这里真是野餐的好地方。”格洛丽亚·格利姆说。

segments.text: It couldn't be better, Gloria.

translation.text: “再好不过了，格洛丽亚。”

segments.text: Brinksley Meers agreed.

translation.text: 布林克斯利·米尔斯表示赞同。

segments.text: No newspapermen, no film fans.

translation.text: “没有记者，也没有影迷。”

segments.text: Why don't we come more often?

translation.text: “我们为什么不常来呢？”

segments.text: Meanwhile, two other actors, Rockwall Slinger and Merlin Greeves, had carried two large food baskets to a shady spot under some trees.

translation.text: 与此同时，另外两名演员罗克沃尔·斯林格和默林·格里夫斯把两个大食物篮搬到树下的一片阴凉处。

segments.text: When they had all made themselves comfortable, a stranger appeared.

translation.text: 大家都安顿舒适后，一个陌生人出现了。

segments.text: He looked very angry.

translation.text: 他看起来非常生气。

segments.text: Now you get out of here, all of you, he shouted.

translation.text: “你们所有人，现在就离开这里！”他喊道。

segments.text: I'm Sheriff here.

translation.text: “我是这里的治安官。”

segments.text: Do you see that notice?

translation.text: “你们看见那块告示了吗？”

segments.text: It says no camping, in case you can't read.

translation.text: “上面写着禁止露营——如果你们还识字的话。”

segments.text: Look, Sheriff, said Rockwall, don't be too hard on us.

translation.text: “听着，治安官，”罗克沃尔说，“别对我们太苛刻。”

segments.text: I'm Rockwall Slinger, and this is Merlin Greeves.

translation.text: “我是罗克沃尔·斯林格，这位是默林·格里夫斯。”

segments.text: Oh, is it?

translation.text: “哦，是吗？”

segments.text: said the Sheriff with a sneer.

translation.text: 治安官冷笑着说。

segments.text: Well, I'm Brinksley Meers, and my other name is Gloria Gleam.

translation.text: “那我就是布林克斯利·米尔斯，我的另一个名字还叫格洛丽亚·格利姆呢。”

segments.text: Now you get out of here fast.

translation.text: “现在赶快离开这里。”
